hero.title: Learn faster and further in small groups!
hero.subtitle: Collaborative learning platform that turns your study materials into mastered knowledge.

whoWeAre.title: Study together in small, motivated groups

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Groups of 3-5 learners collaborate on a shared platform to reach their learning goals.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Learners feed and share an AI-powered knowledge base using innovative educational tools.

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: Advance together, share ideas, exchange feedback, and reach your objectives as a team.

whyKartel.title: Kartel: the best way to learn?

point1.title: 🎯 Active learning keeps engagement high
point1.description: Daily online sessions, group chats, peer messages, shared notes, and learning tips.

point2.title: 🤝 Collaborative support
point2.description: Learn as a team in a true collaborative workshop. Every member brings knowledge, questions, and ideas... The goal: understand, master, and succeed together.

point3.title: ⚡ Smart tools for better learning together
point3.description: Kartel provides a complete AI toolbox... 🧠 Adaptive quizzes, 📝 Collaborative MCQs, 🃏 Automatic flashcards, 🗺 Dynamic mindmaps, 🎭 Video role-playing, 📊 Shared progress dashboards, 💬 Educational AI chat, 🎯 Team challenges, 📚 Automatic summaries, 🔁 Review sheets...

point1.title: 🎯 Visible, measurable progress
point1.description: Thanks to group dynamics and Kartel's AI tools... +45% higher success rate in small group courses.

point2.title: 🤝 Motivation that lasts
point2.description: Small group learning creates real engagement... 9 out of 10 users feel more motivated with Kartel than with traditional LMS.

point3.title: 🧩 Stronger, validated skills
point3.description: Every group aims for a common goal... Result: learners who are more competent, autonomous, and confident in their future.

testimonial1.text: Kartels has transformed the way we work in groups. It's an essential tool!
testimonial1.author: Marie Dubois

testimonial2.text: The platform is intuitive and comprehensive. Perfect for our collaborative projects.

testimonial3.text: A huge time saver with all tools gathered in one place.

knowledgeBase.title: AI Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.subtitle: Feed your shared knowledge base and chat with your Kartel AI about your documents, deadlines, and goals.

chat.title: Chat with your knowledge base
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm your AI assistant. Ask me questions about your documents.
chat.sampleQuestion: Can you give me a summary of Module 12?
chat.sampleAnswer: Of course! Module 12 covers adult learning methodologies, including andragogy principles, facilitation techniques, and competency assessment.

toasts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all documents?
